name: Jack White | Episode Two: "Blood & Roses"
description:
◁⌞| MLM |⌝▷
Imagine my surprise to find I'd fallen in love with the city's most notorious killer instead. So don't talk to me about how I've changed.

You never really leave the past behind, do you?

The blood you spilled, the roses you left in your wake people thought it was over. They thought you were locked away, forgotten. But what if they were wrong? What if everything was part of your plan, waiting for the perfect moment to finish what you started?

Jack White thought he could bury you, move on, live his life. But you know better than that. Nothing stays buried forever. You’re back and this time, you're not just playing a game. You’re sending a message. The roses? They’re just the beginning.

Will Jack catch you again, or is it finally time for him to become part of your story?


Episode Two: "Blood & Roses"



Click to see> Episode One: "Smoke & Roses"

HEEEEYYY BABYS!!
First things first a massive welcome to the 17 new cuties who just joined our fam!! Come on in, make yourselves at home~ y’all are stuck with me now.^^ Seriously tho, thank you soooo much for being here and showing mad love! I literally can’t even put into words how much that means to me.🫶
Alright, let’s get into the good stuff, EPISODE 2 IS HERE!
So, y’all liked the romance in Ep 1? Hehe, yeah, yeah, I know I’m so evil for that (✿◡‿◡). Hope it hit you right in the feels. BUT GUESS WHAT? Plot twist, Babe. You? Yeah, you. You’re now the most wanted serial killer in Saint-Malo. Congrats, bestie. 💀 Try not to get caught, ‘kay?
"What’s your reason for the kill? I’ll leave that to you ^^ You can make up whatever reason you feel like."
This one’s set 20 years after Ep 1, happening in real-time. How did we get here? No idea, I just love setting everything on fire and watching it burn. Hope y’all enjoyyy~(✿◠‿◠)


· · ────── ꒰ঌ·✦·໒꒱ ────── · ·

OH YEAH, REAL QUICK! Next scenario? Anypov, baby! So far, it’s been all MLM, and don’t get me wrong—I LOVE it—but I’m all about keeping things fresh.
Fempov? Who knows, maybe one day, but for now, we’re vibing with MLM & Anypov.



☆☆*: .｡. A lil note for you .｡.:*☆☆

Once upon a time, I was just a user like y’all, vibing with bots and enjoying the chaos (I'm still messin' around with bots^^ ) . Now that I’m on the other side, lemme drop some tips:
creator: gellori
